repos_pt:
[shrtr](https://github.com/caiocampos/shrtr) - TypeScript Encurtador de links usando React, NestJS (Express) e MongoDB (Mongoose)

[img-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/img-fuse) - Rust Projeto de programa em rust para mesclar imagens para usar em cards digitais

[web-games](https://github.com/cao-ancap/web-games) - HTML Lista de jogos desenvolvidos por Cachorro Anarquista que podem ser testados em navegador
repos_en:
[shrtr](https://github.com/caiocampos/shrtr) - TypeScript Link shortener using React, NestJS (Express) and MongoDB (Mongoose)

[img-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/img-fuse) - Rust Rust program project to merge images to use in digital cards

[web-games](https://github.com/cao-ancap/web-games) - HTML List of games developed by Anarchist Dog that can be tested in browser
repos_es:
[shrtr](https://github.com/caiocampos/shrtr) - TypeScript Encurtador de enlaces usando React, NestJS (Express) y MongoDB (Mongoose)

[img-fuse](https://github.com/caiocampos/img-fuse) - Rust Proyecto de programa en rust para mezclar imágenes para usar en tarjetas digitales

[web-games](https://github.com/cao-ancap/web-games) - HTML Lista de juegos desarrollados por Perro Anarquista que pueden ser probados en navegador
